/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -O1 -g -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/fysics_shared.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libfysics.so -o libfysics.so CMakeFiles/fysics_shared.dir/fft.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics_shared.dir/paganin.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics_shared.dir/dering.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics_shared.dir/stream.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics_shared.dir/guided.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics_shared.dir/musica.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics_shared.dir/zdrift.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics_shared.dir/noise.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics_shared.dir/register.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics_shared.dir/phasecorr.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics_shared.dir/zarr_io.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics_shared.dir/pipeline.c.o CMakeFiles/fysics_shared.dir/vendor/libs3/libs3.c.o  -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/15/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
